title: Reviving the Ovia Sacred Festival in Bunu Lands
summary: Oral historian interviews mapping the ancestral significance of the periodic Ovia ritual celebrations, native chants transcription, and digital audio preservation efforts.

body.raw: Traditional Ovia masquerade invocations represent a profound indigenous heritage framework. Archival fieldwork successfully recorded sacred instrumental ensembles, accompanying tonal linguistic chants, and documented specific sacred groves designated for community generational transition rites.
